form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation third of 13 at Southwell All Weather October 31 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Lakers carrying 58.5kg at $4.30. Previously first up; sixth of 14 at Thirsk August 29 over 1200m, 4 len behind Eternal Sunshine with 59.5kg at $8. In the right race and sure to go well.

form.formComment: Last start second last in a small field at this track on March 23 over 1200m, 4 len behind Yorkshire Glory carrying 61.5kg at $6. The start before that second last of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 4 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind City Cyclone with 61.5kg at $6.50. Finds a suitable race and should be prominent.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 18 over 1400m, 9 len behind Mount Athos carrying 52.5kg at $34. The start before that 6th of 10 at Lingfield All Weather on February 27 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Apiarist with 57kg at $29. Needs to find a few lengths to threaten these.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months won by 1.0 len at Chelmsford March 26 over 1200m defeating Combustion carrying 61kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 5th of 16 at Epsom Downs on June 7 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Stormy Impact with 57kg at $17. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 11 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 28 over 1200m, 6 len behind Tuco Salamanca with 54kg at $29. The race before that won by 0.5 len at Kempton Park All Weather March 4 over 1200m defeating Hundred Caps carrying 57kg at $9.50. Doesn't appeal.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of three-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation by 0.5 len this track December 26 over 1200m defeating Lady Wingalong with 59kg at $7.50. Previously first up; seventh of 11 at Windsor June 2 over 1200m, 0.7 len behind Fleetwater carrying 59.5kg at $10. Should run well.
